title: SkyeRoutexFlow + Platform House Circle — 2026 Codebase Valuation
summary: This valuation reflects the entire current codebase: route and dispatch operations, proof/export infrastructure, AE/CRM layers, integrated Platform House Circle hospitality domain, live-ops mesh, cloud sync, MFA/device trust, locking, event-feed coordination, and productization/discoverability surfaces.

components.label: Core route, dispatch, field execution, and offline operating spine
components.rationale: Route creation, stop execution, proof capture, route economics, offline persistence, and operator dispatch behavior are already present.

components.label: Proof vault, exports, binders, handoff packets, and operator evidence surfaces
components.rationale: The codebase contains closure, proof, export, handoff, and launch-board lanes that turn work into auditable deliverables.

components.label: AE/CRM, account intelligence, follow-up motion, and command workflow layers
components.rationale: The platform already contains sales/account intelligence behavior rather than stopping at route delivery mechanics.

components.label: Platform House Circle hospitality, guest/member, events, campaigns, packets, and POS domain
components.rationale: Hospitality/member/event/readiness logic is now a native domain inside the same operating system.

components.label: Live ops mesh: QR, adapter lanes, webhook inbox, job queue, cloud sync, and security coordination
components.rationale: V63–V65 materially expanded the app into cloud-coordinated, multi-operator, security-aware infrastructure.

components.label: Packaging, PWA shell, documentation, branding, investor discoverability, and operator polish
components.rationale: The app ships as a cohesive product with docs, smoke outputs, deploy guidance, and discoverable investor artifacts.

includedModules: SkyeRoutexFlow core route and dispatch system
Proof vault, exports, binders, receipts, and handoff surfaces
AE/CRM account lanes and follow-up control surfaces
Live ops mesh: QR, webhook, jobs, adapters, sync, and replay
Cloud sync mesh, signed sessions, MFA, trusted devices, locks, and event feed
Discoverable investor valuation center and exportable valuation artifacts
notes: Value reflects the current shipped codebase and integrated architecture, not a stripped-down MVP reading.
Number assumes enterprise-grade replacement cost, operational productization value, and the premium of a multi-domain stack already collapsed into one operator system.
External live credentials and production deployment can increase realized commercial value, but are not required for this codebase-level valuation record.
